Title: Add composite storage model and metadata
Body: Store composite name, area_ids, primary_area, timestamps, and enabled status. Ensure schema migration path.

Title: Implement same-floor composite validation
Body: Reject cross-floor membership at validation time with clear error messages.

Title: Implement scope resolver room-floor-concierge
Body: Create deterministic effective value resolver with precedence room > floor > concierge.

Title: Extend update_composite_config for rename and membership edits
Body: Support name and area_ids updates in a single deterministic transaction.

Title: Implement sync_composites service
Body: Rebuild projections and validate invocation parity and membership integrity.

Title: Implement stale composite device cleanup
Body: When membership changes, remove stale devices from composite snapshots and selectors.

Title: Build main UI three-tier layout
Body: Render concierge-wide, floor-wide, and room-card sections.

Title: Add merge mode on main UI
Body: Add merge button, name input, and room-card checkboxes for selection.

Title: Enforce same-floor selection in merge UI
Body: Prevent cross-floor selections and show inline validation.

Title: Render composite tile replacement behavior
Body: Replace member room cards with one composite tile that lists member rooms.

Title: Add composite edit panel
Body: Add edit action, rename input, and member checklist.

Title: Support partial unmerge projection updates
Body: Unjoined room card returns; remaining members stay as composite.

Title: Support full composite dismantle
Body: If all members removed, delete composite and restore all room cards.

Title: Build composite device union selectors
Body: Selectors are union of devices across member rooms with deterministic ordering and dedupe.

Title: Add category grouping in composite detail
Body: Lights, lamps(label), speakers, voice assistants, shades, tv, sensors.

Title: Gate room/composite options by global capabilities
Body: Show/hide AI, TTS, and Asset Intelligence dependent options.

Title: Implement voice invocation promotion to composite
Body: Invocation from any member-room voice endpoint resolves to composite context.

Title: Enforce execution parity across member rooms
Body: Same command from any member room resolves and executes identically.

Title: Implement update_floor_config service
Body: Add floor defaults for thermostat/HVAC and media routing.

Title: Implement get_floor_config service
Body: Return floor config plus effective defaults and diagnostics.

Title: Add Music Assistant global enable plus floor defaults
Body: Global capability toggle with floor routing defaults and room overrides.

Title: Implement floor-scoped thermostat defaults with room overrides
Body: Thermostat/HVAC defaults at floor scope, explicit room exceptions supported.

Title: Add tests for same-floor and cross-floor merge behavior
Body: Validate merge constraints and user-facing error responses.

Title: Add tests for rename
Body: partial unmerge

Title: Add tests for composite invocation determinism
Body: Validate composite context promotion and consistent execution from any member room.

Body: Expose composite membership and resolved settings in diagnostics payload.

Title: Prepare release checklist execution
Body: Run tests and validations, update docs and manifest version, verify HACS and hassfest.
